task_completion.description: Create the new quality alert team named 'ISO Surveillance Response Team'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'ISO Surveillance Response Team' in the Quality Teams list view, form view, or as a selectable option in the Team dropdown of a Quality Alert.

task_completion.description: Assign the 'Critical Weld Failure on Frame' alert to the new team and escalate its priority to Urgent.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the alert 'Critical Weld Failure on Frame' in a form or list view showing 'ISO Surveillance Response Team' as the assigned team and exactly 2 out of 3 stars filled for priority (which corresponds to Urgent).

task_completion.description: Assign the 'Loose Hardware on Shelf Unit' alert to the new team and escalate its priority to Urgent.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the alert 'Loose Hardware on Shelf Unit' showing 'ISO Surveillance Response Team' as the assigned team and exactly 2 out of 3 stars filled for priority (Urgent).

task_completion.description: Assign the 'Chair Armrest Cracking' alert to the new team and escalate its priority to Urgent.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the alert 'Chair Armrest Cracking' showing 'ISO Surveillance Response Team' as the assigned team and exactly 2 out of 3 stars filled for priority (Urgent).

task_completion.description: Assign the remaining 'New' stage alerts to the new team without changing their priority.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the other 'New' stage alerts (e.g., 'Paint Discoloration on Metal Panels', 'Incorrect Spacing Between Components', 'Material Hardness Below Specification', 'Desk Laminate Delamination', 'Screen Frame Scratch on Delivery') assigned to 'ISO Surveillance Response Team' with 0 stars filled (Normal priority).

integrity.description: The agent must use the Odoo web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Odoo web application in a browser. There should be no terminal windows open executing Python scripts, psql commands, or curl requests to modify the database directly.

integrity.description: The agent must not use browser developer tools to fake the results.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure the browser's developer console or 'Inspect Element' panel is not open and being used to alter the HTML text of the alerts or team names.

integrity.description: The agent must interact with genuine Odoo views (Kanban, List, Form).
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show standard Odoo UI elements (breadcrumbs, search bar, standard Odoo buttons) rather than a custom HTML page or text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target team name is exactly 'ISO Surveillance Response Team'. There are 8 total alerts in the 'New' stage. 3 of these are safety-critical based on keywords (Weld, Hardware, Cracking): 'Critical Weld Failure on Frame', 'Loose Hardware on Shelf Unit', and 'Chair Armrest Cracking'. These 3 must be escalated to 'Urgent' priority. In Odoo, priority is represented by stars: 0 stars = Normal, 1 star = High, 2 stars = Urgent, 3 stars = Blocker. Therefore, the 3 safety-critical alerts must have 2 stars, while the remaining 5 alerts must be assigned to the new team but remain at 0 stars.
